strengths: Currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq—hands-on expertise in cutting-edge AI tooling systems directly aligned with AI-powered product development
19+ years of technical leadership shipping systems at scale: managed millions of concurrent requests (Dunnhumby), millions of transactions (Optilyz), across diverse technical domains
Proven platform architect and builder: founded GISCollective open-source platform with real-world adoption, mentored teams, created and taught technical curriculum
concerns: AI expertise is newly demonstrated—current MCP/AI infrastructure work began April 2025; career lacks shipped AI products or platforms, creating a gap against the preferred expertise profile
Cloud platform strategy expertise not evident—has used AWS CDK and Kubernetes but no resume evidence of designing enterprise cloud transformations or multi-region architecture
Enterprise customer advisory experience absent—no visible track record advising strategic customers and partners on technology adoption decisions
response.justification: Bogdan substantially exceeds the 15-year requirement with 19+ years of technical leadership, currently building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq—the exact tooling underpinning modern AI platforms. His career demonstrates proven ability to architect and ship systems at scale: millions of concurrent requests (Dunnhumby), millions of transactions (Optilyz), across diverse domains. He exhibits the hands-on builder mentality and platform thinking required: founder of GISCollective with real adoption, continuous hands-on coder across multiple stacks, and educator who mentored teams and shaped technical culture. His immediate strength is technical credibility in cutting-edge AI infrastructure; his development area is enterprise cloud strategy and customer advisory. His trajectory into AI infrastructure combined with two decades of proven technical excellence makes him a credible fit for this Director-level Individual Contributor position.
